app.name: Alfanous
app.one_liner: A Quranic search engine API that provides simple and advanced search capabilities for the Holy Qur'an with support for Arabic text, Buckwalter transliteration, and rich metadata.

screens.name: Search Interface
screens.purpose: Enable users to perform simple or advanced Boolean searches on Quranic text and view results with metadata and translations.
primary_actions: Filter results by facets (Sura, Juz, topic)

rust_commands.name: fetch_translations
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve available translations for Quranic verses, ensuring up-to-date and complete listing with human-readable names.

rust_commands.name: get_recitations
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch highest-quality recitation metadata per author without duplicates.

rust_commands.name: search_verses
rust_commands.purpose: Execute a Quranic search query using either Arabic or Buckwalter transliteration and return paginated results with metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Expose RESTful endpoints for search and metadata retrieval
week 1: Implement core search functionality with Arabic and Buckwalter support
week 1: Integrate faceted filtering by Sura and Juz
acceptance_tests: Faceted search aggregates results correctly by Sura and Juz.
Recitations list contains only the highest bitrate entry per reciter with no duplicates.
The /show/translations endpoint returns all indexed translations with human-readable names.
The system returns correct verse matches for Arabic queries like 'الله'.
The system returns correct verse matches for Buckwalter queries like 'Allh'.
